name: Umar ibn Zabi
title: Brave Penitent
shortDescription: One of the braves who came to Karbala with Ibn Sa'd's army, but upon recognizing the truth, joined the Imam's army and was martyred.
fullStory:
Umar ibn Dabi'a al-Duba'i was one of the brave warriors and horsemen of Kufa. Initially, influenced by the prevailing atmosphere in Kufa, he came to Karbala with Umar ibn Sa'd's army to fight Imam Hussain (AS).

However, on Ashura, when he heard the enlightening arguments and sermons of Imam Hussain (AS) and his companions, and saw that the Kufan army had unfairly blocked the water from the Ahl al-Bayt, his conscience awakened.

Along with a few others (like Hurr ibn Yazid al-Riyahi), he left the army of falsehood and joined the camp of truth. He tearfully repented of his past and asked the Imam for permission to fight.

After joining the Imam, Umar ibn Dabi'a struck the heart of the enemy's army and fought valiantly until he attained martyrdom in one of the attacks before noon on Ashura, immortalizing his name in the Ziyarat al-Nahiya al-Muqaddasa.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلَى عُمَرَ بْنِ ضُبَيْعَةَ الضُّبَعِيِّ...
quote: (Ziyarat al-Nahiya:) Peace be upon Umar ibn Dabi'a al-Duba'i...
